Genel amaçlı yapısal çelik. Kaynak edile: General-purpose structural steel. Weldability: Very good. Usage: Structural steel, profiles, pipes.
Yüksek dayanımlı yapısal çelik. Kaynak e: High-strength structural steel. Weldability: Good. Usage: Bridges, cranes, pressure vessels.
Orta karbonlu ıslah çeliği. Sertleştiril: Medium carbon quench and temper steel. Hardenable. Usage: Shafts, gears, pins, bolts.
SAE/AISI Çelik Sınıflandırma Sistemi. İl: SAE/AISI steel classification system. The first two digits indicate the alloy group, the last two digits the carbon percentage (x100).
En yaygın yapısal alüminyum. Mükemmel ka: Most common structural aluminum. Excellent weldability and corrosion resistance.
Havacılık sınıfı yüksek dayanımlı alümin: Aerospace-grade high-strength aluminum. Non-weldable. Usage: Aircraft structures, precision parts.
Yaygın kullanılan metallerin yoğunluk de: Density values of commonly used metals.
Gerilme (σ): Birim alana düşen kuvvet. G: Stress (σ): Force per unit area. Strain (ε): Unit elongation. Typical stress-strain curve for steel includes elastic region, yield point, strain hardening, and fracture stages.
S = Akma Dayanımı / Çalışma Gerilmesi. S: S = Yield Strength / Working Stress. Static loads: S = 1.5-2.0. Dynamic loads: S = 2.0-3.0. Impact loads: S = 3.0-5.0.
Bir kiriş eğildiğinde, üst liflerinde ba: When a beam is bent, compressive stress occurs in its upper fibers, and tensile stress in its lower fibers. Stress is zero on the neutral axis.
Kesit geometrisine bağlı atalet momenti: Moment of inertia values depending on cross-section geometry.
Dairesel kesitlerde burulma gerilmesi ve: Calculation of torsion stress and torsion angle in circular cross-sections.
İnce uzun çubukların basınç altında burk: Buckling strength of slender rods under pressure. K changes according to support conditions.
2 boyutlu gerilme durumunda asal gerilme: Calculation of principal stresses and maximum shear stress in a 2D stress state. On Mohr's circle, σ₁, σ₂ principal stresses are read on the horizontal axis, τ_max at the highest point on the vertical axis.
İki ucundan mesnetlenmiş kiriş formüller: Formulas for a beam supported at both ends. Moment and deflection formulas for point load, distributed load, and triangular distributed loads.
Bir ucu ankastre (gömülü) kiriş formülle: Formulas for a beam fixed (embedded) at one end.
ISO 898-1 standardına göre cıvata sınıfl: Bolt classes according to ISO 898-1. First digit: tensile strength/100. Second digit: yield/tensile ratio*10. E.g., 8.8 -> 800 MPa tensile, 80% yield ratio = 640 MPa yield.
Cıvata çekme ve kayma gerilmesi hesaplar: Bolt tensile and shear stress calculations.
Köşe kaynağı ve alın kaynağı gerilme hes: Stress calculations for fillet and butt welds.
a: köşe ölçüsü, L: kaynak boyu: a: throat size, L: weld length
Mil-kama bağlantısında ezme ve kesme kon: Crushing and shearing check in shaft-key joints.
Diş açma operasyonlarında kullanılan tem: Basic thread profiles used in threading operations. Metric (M), Unified (UN), Whitworth (W), Parallel Pipe (G), Taper Pipe (R/BSPT), NPT, and Trapezoidal (Tr) thread types are available.
ISO Metrik vida dişi. 60 derece diş açıs: ISO Metric screw thread. 60 degree thread angle. Symbol: M (dia x pitch). Example: M30 = 30mm dia, 3.5mm standard pitch. Fine pitch versions are also available.
Amerikan Birleştirilmiş vida dişi sistem: American Unified screw thread system. 60 degree thread angle. UNC: Unified National Coarse. UNF: Unified National Fine. UNEF: extra fine thread. Dimensions are in inches, pitch is expressed in threads/inch.
Boru bağlantılarında kullanılan diş tipl: Thread types used in pipe connections. G (BSP Parallel): Non-sealing connections, requires a gasket. R/BSPT (Taper): 1:16 taper, provides a sealed connection. NPT: American standard, 1:16 taper, 60 degree thread angle.
İngiliz Whitworth standardı. 55 derece d: British Whitworth standard. 55 degree thread angle, rounded thread root profile. Although an old British standard, it is still used in some applications. BSW (coarse thread) and BSF (fine thread) versions are available.
30 derece trapezoid profilli hareket vid: Lead screw thread with a 30 degree trapezoidal profile. Designed for high axial force transmission. Used in screw presses, CNC machines, lifting mechanisms, and door/cover mechanisms. DIN 103 standard.
Delik bazlı geçme sistemi (H sistemi). H: Hole-basis fit system (H system). H7/g6: Sliding fit (clearance). H7/k6: Transition fit (near zero). H7/p6: Interference fit (press fit). Tolerance zone color coding: green=clearance, yellow=transition, red=interference.
Yüzey pürüzlülüğü Ra değerleri ve bunlar: Surface roughness Ra values and processing methods to achieve them.
ISO 281 standardina gore nominal omur he: Nominal life calculation according to ISO 281. Bearings consist of inner ring, outer ring, balls, and cage. Life calculation depends on the ratio of dynamic load capacity (C) to equivalent load (P).
Yaygın rulman tipleri ve uygulama alanla: Common bearing types and application areas. Deep groove, angular contact, cylindrical roller, tapered roller, needle roller, and spherical plain bearing types are available.
SKF Sabit Bilyali Rulman Katalogu (6200: SKF Deep Groove Ball Bearing Catalog (6200 Series)
SKF marka sabit bilyalı rulmanlar (Deep: SKF brand deep groove ball bearings. It's the most common bearing type. High speed capacity, low friction, carries both radial and axial loads. Available in sealed (2RS/2Z) and open versions.
SKF Sabit Bilyali Rulman (6300 Serisi -: SKF Deep Groove Ball Bearing (6300 Series - Heavy)
6300 serisi, 6200 serisine gore daha yük: The 6300 series has higher load capacity than the 6200 series. Uses wider and larger balls. Suitable for heavy loading conditions.
Rulman ic bilezigini mile, dis bilezigin: ISO tolerances used when mounting the inner ring to the shaft and the outer ring to the housing. The rotating ring should have an interference fit, while the stationary ring should have a clearance/sliding fit.
SKF Açılı Temaslı Bilyalı Rulman (7200 S: SKF Angular Contact Ball Bearing (7200 Series)
Açılı temaslı bilyalı rulmanlar (Angular: Angular contact ball bearings. 40 degree contact angle. Suitable for high combined axial and radial loads. Generally mounted in pairs (tandem, O or X arrangement). Ideal for machine tools and pumps.
Silindirik makaralı rulmanlar (Cylindric: Cylindrical roller bearings. Very high radial load capacity. Does not carry axial load (NU type). Inner and outer rings can be separated. Ideal for gearboxes, electric motors, rolling mills.
Konik makaralı rulmanlar (Tapered Roller: Tapered roller bearings. Carries both radial and axial combined loads. Separable structure. Ideal for wheel hubs, gearbox reducers, conveyor rollers. Generally used in pairs.
Igne makaralı rulmanlar (Needle Roller B: Needle roller bearings. Compact design with very low radial cross-section height. High radial load capacity. Preferred for oscillating movements and limited space applications.
Eksenel (aksiyel) bilyalı rulmanlar (Thr: Thrust ball bearings. Carries one-way axial load. Does not carry radial load. Low-medium speed applications. Ideal for vertical shafts, screw presses, rotary tables.
SKF Sabit Bilyali Rulman (6000 Serisi -: SKF Deep Groove Ball Bearing (6000 Series - Light)
6000 serisi, 6200 serisine gore daha dar: The 6000 series is narrower and lighter than the 6200 series. Suitable for low-medium loads and compact applications. Provides high speed capacity.
SKF Sabit Bilyali Rulman (6400 Serisi -: SKF Deep Groove Ball Bearing (6400 Series - Extra Heavy)
En yüksek yük kapasiteli sabit bilyalı r: The highest load capacity deep groove ball bearing series. Large balls and wide cross-section. Suitable for heavy industrial applications, mining machinery, cement and paper mills.
Ince kesit (thin section) sabit bilyalı: Thin section deep groove ball bearings. Compact design with very low radial cross-section height. Ideal for robot wrists, optical devices, medical equipment, and precision measuring instruments.
SKF Açılı Temaslı Bilyalı Rulman (7300 S: SKF Angular Contact Ball Bearing (7300 Series - Heavy)
7300 serisi açılı temaslı bilyalı rulman: 7300 series angular contact ball bearings. 40 degree contact angle. Higher load capacity than the 7200 series. Ideal for heavy combined loads. Used in pumps, compressors, and machine tools.
NJ tipi silindirik makaralı rulmanlar. D: NJ type cylindrical roller bearings. Outer ring with two flanges, inner ring with one flange. Carries both radial and unidirectional axial loads. Offers axial locating capability. Preferred in gearbox, electric motor, and fan applications.
Kendinden ayarlı (self-aligning) bilyalı: Self-aligning ball bearings. Two rows of balls, spherical outer ring raceway. Compensates for up to +-2 degrees of misalignment. Used in long shaft applications, agricultural and textile machinery.
2200 serisi, 1200 serisine gore daha gen: The 2200 series is wider and has higher load capacity than the 1200 series self-aligning ball bearings. Uses larger balls. Preferred for heavy load and misalignment conditions.
Küresel makaralı rulmanlar (Spherical Ro: Spherical roller bearings. Two rows of barrel-shaped rollers, spherical outer ring raceway. Very high radial load capacity. Compensates for up to +-2 degrees of misalignment. Widely used in heavy industrial applications, conveyors, crushers, fans, gearboxes, and paper machines.
SKF Kuresel Makarali Rulman (232xx Seris: SKF Spherical Roller Bearing (232xx Series - Heavy)
23200 serisi küresel makaralı rulmanlar,: The 23200 series spherical roller bearings are wider and have higher load capacity than the 22200 series. Designed for heavy shock loads and vibration conditions. Preferred for mining, steel industry, large fans, and crushing machinery.
32200 serisi konik makaralı rulmanlar. 3: 32200 series tapered roller bearings. Wider and has higher load capacity than the 30200 series. Suitable for heavy combined radial-axial loads. Used in automotive differentials, industrial reducers, and conveyor systems.
SKF Eksenel Bilyali Rulman (51200 Serisi: SKF Thrust Ball Bearing (51200 Series - Heavy)
51200 series thrust ball bearings. Wider and has higher axial load capacity than the 51100 series. Carries one-way axial load. Used in screw presses, rotary tables, and vertical shaft applications.
Duz disli cark geometrisi ve mukavemet h: Spur gear geometry and strength calculation. Pitch circle, addendum circle, and dedendum circle dimensions are calculated based on module (m) during the meshing of two gears.
Boru ici akista surtunme basinc kaybi he: Calculation of frictional pressure drop in pipe flow.
Uc temel isi transfer mekanizmasi formul: Formulas for the three basic heat transfer mechanisms.
Muhendislikte sik kullanilan fiziksel sa: Physical constants commonly used in engineering.
Temel geometrik sekillerin alan ve hacim: Area and volume formulas for basic geometric shapes.
Avrupa standardi I profil boyutlari ve k: European standard I-beam dimensions and cross-sectional values. The cross-sectional view of the IPE profile is defined by h (height), b (flange width), tw (web thickness), tf (flange thickness), and r (fillet radius).
Geniş başlıklı Avrupa standardı H profil: Wide flange European standard H profile dimensions (light series).
Wide flange European standard H profile dimensions (normal series). Thicker and heavier than the HEA series, offers higher load-bearing capacity.
Avrupa standardı U profil (NPU) boyutlar: European standard U profile (NPU) dimensions and section values. The center of gravity (ey) is outside the web.
Genel endustriyel kullanim icin klasik V: Standard dimensions for classical V-belts and narrow V-belts for general industrial use.
İki kasnaklı bir sistemde yaklaşık kayış: Approximate belt length calculation formula for a system with two pulleys.
Düz dişliler için temel AGMA/ISO terimle: Basic AGMA/ISO terms for spur gears. Module (m) is the standard for metric gears. Formula: Pitch circle diameter (d) = Module (m) * Number of teeth (z).
Lewis formül, diş dibindeki eğilme geril: Lewis formula calculates the bending stress at the tooth root. F_t: Tangential force, b: Face width, Y: Lewis form factor. Formula: sigma = F_t / (b * m * Y)
Helezon baskı yaylarının hesaplanması. Y: Calculation of helical compression springs. Wire diameter (d), Mean coil diameter (D), Spring index (C = D/d). Stiffness: k = (G * d^4) / (8 * D^3 * N_a). The Wahl factor (K_w), which includes shear and curvature effects, is added to the shear stress formula.
Sabit Bilyali Rulman Standart Serisi: Deep Groove Ball Bearing Standard Series
Endüstride en yaygın kullanılan sabit bi: Inner (shaft) and outer diameter references for the most widely used deep groove ball bearings in the industry (e.g., SKF 6000 series). Last two digits * 5 = Inner diameter (for 20mm and above). E.g., 6204 = 04 * 5 = 20mm inner diameter.
Standart asenkron elektrik motorları (IE: Standard asynchronous electric motors (IEC standards). H = Shaft axis height.
Metrik standart (M) vidalar için kılavuz: Tap drill size table for metric standard (M) screws. Formula: Drill diameter = Thread diameter - Pitch (d = D - P). Data is optimized for 75% thread depth for shop floor manufacturing operations.
Standart Sac Kalinliklari ve Agirliklari: Standard Sheet Metal Thicknesses and Weights
Endüstride sık kullanılan standart dkp v: Standard DKP and black sheet metal thickness measurements frequently used in the industry and approximate weights for 1 m^2 plate (7.85 g/cm^3).
Abkant preslerde sac bükülürken uzayan k: Calculation of the elongated part while bending sheet metal in press brakes (Unfolded Length). K-Factor indicates the amount of shift of the material's neutral axis. For general steels, the industry standard is between K = 0.33 and 0.44.
Örtülü Elektrot Ark Kaynağı (SMAW) için: AWS A5.1 classification example for Shielded Metal Arc Welding (SMAW): E7018. E = Electrode, 70 = tensile strength (70,000 psi / 480 MPa), 1 = All positions (Flat, Horizontal, Vertical, Overhead), 8 = Coating type (Low hydrogen, potassium/iron powder).
Teknik resimlerde kullanılan kaynak semb: Basic meanings of weld symbols used in technical drawings. The symbol "below" the reference line represents the Arrow Side, and the symbol "above" represents the Other Side.
koniklik, sizdirmaz baglanti saglar. NP: koniklik, sizdirmaz baglanti saglar. NPT: Amerikan standardi, 1 derece 47
7300 serisi açısal temaslı bilyalı rulma: 7300 serisi acisal temasli bilyali rulmanlar. 40 derece temas acisi. 7200 serisine gore daha yuksek yuk kapasitesi. Agir kombine yukler icin idealdir. Pompa, kompresor ve takim tezgahlarinda kullanilir.
Acisal temasli bilyali rulmanlar (Angula: Acisal temasli bilyali rulmanlar (Angular Contact Ball Bearings). Temas acisi 40 derece. Yuksek aksiyel ve radyal kombine yuklere uygun. Genellikle ciftli (tandem, O veya X duzeni) monte edilir. Takim tezgahlari ve pompalar icin idealdir.
Bir yzeyin tam duz olma derecesi: Bir yzeyin tam duz olma derecesi
Düşük hidrojen, ağır şase ve çatlak risk: Düşük hidrojen, ağır şase ve çatlak riski
En güvenli (muhafazakar) teori. Akma çiz: En güvenli (muhafazakar) teori. Akma çizgisine sınırlar.
En yüksek yuk kapasiteli sabit bilyalı r: En yuksek yuk kapasiteli sabit bilyali rulman serisi. Buyuk bilyalar ve genis kesit. Agir endustriyel uygulamalar, maden makineleri, cimento ve kagit fabrikalari icin uygundur.
Eşdeğer gerilme, distorsiyon enerjisi ak: Eşdeğer gerilme, distorsiyon enerjisi akma enerjisini aştığında akma başlar.
Geometrik Boyutlandirma ve Toleranslandi: Geometrik Boyutlandirma ve Toleranslandirma (GD&T), imalatta parca geometrisini kontrol etmek icin kullanilan sistemdir.
Iki kasnakli bir sistemde yaklasik kayis: Iki kasnakli bir sistemde yaklasik kayis boyu hesaplama formul.
Iki veya daha fazla parcacigin eksen kac: Iki veya daha fazla parcacigin eksen kacagi
Ingiliz Whitworth standardi. 55 derece d: Ingiliz Whitworth standardi. 55 derece dis aisi, yuvarlak dis dibi profili. Eski Ingiliz standardi olmasina ragmen bazi uygulamalarda hl kullanilir. BSW (kaba dis) ve BSF (ince dis) versiyonlari mevcuttur.
Kendinden ayarli (self-aligning) bilyalı: Kendinden ayarli (self-aligning) bilyali rulmanlar. Iki sira bilya, kuresel dis bilezik yolu. +-2 eksen sapmasini (misalignment) kompanse eder. Uzun mil uygulamalari, tarim ve tekstil makinelerinde kullanilir.
Kuresel makaralı rulmanlar (Spherical Ro: Kuresel makarali rulmanlar (Spherical Roller Bearings). Iki sira fici sekilli makara, kuresel dis bilezik yolu. Cok yuksek radyal yuk kapasitesi. +-2 eksen sapmasini kompanse eder. Agir endustriyel uygulamalar, konveyor, kirici, fan, disli kutusu ve kagit makinelerinde yaygin kullanilir.
Kırılma (Ultimate) çizgisine gider. Daha: Kırılma (Ultimate) çizgisine gider. Daha az muhafazakar.
Mil boyunca hareket edildigindeki toplam: Mil boyunca hareket edildigindeki toplam salgi
SKF Acisal Temasli Bilyali Rulman (7200: SKF Acisal Temasli Bilyali Rulman (7200 Serisi)
SKF Acisal Temasli Bilyali Rulman (7300: SKF Acisal Temasli Bilyali Rulman (7300 Serisi - Agir)
Sac kaynağı, düzgün dikiş (AC ve DC): Sac kaynağı, düzgün dikiş (AC ve DC)
Sünek malzemelerdeki yorulma deneylerine: Sünek malzemelerdeki yorulma deneylerine en yakın eğri.
Sünek ve gevrek malzemelerin 3 eksenli k: Sünek ve gevrek malzemelerin 3 eksenli kompleks gerilme altında akmasını (veya kırılmasını) öngören teoriler.
Titreşimli veya periyodik değişken geril: Titreşimli veya periyodik değişken gerilmelere maruz kalan hareketli parçaların (miller, krank gibi) sonsuz ömür dizaynı. Ortalama gerilme (σ_m) ve Alternatif gerilme (σ_a) koordinat sisteminde çizilir.
Yaygin rulman tipleri ve uygulama alanla: Yaygin rulman tipleri ve uygulama alanlari. Sabit bilyali, acisal temasli, silindirik makarali, konik makarali, igne makarali ve eksenel bilyali rulman tipleri mevcuttur.
Yuzey veya eksenin referansa gore 90 dik: Yuzey veya eksenin referansa gore 90 dikligi
Yuzeyin referansa gore spesifik aci bekl: Yuzeyin referansa gore spesifik aci beklentisi
ozelligin CAD datasina gore tam konumu: ozelligin CAD datasina gore tam konumu
İki ucundan mesnetlenmiş kiriş formüller: Formulas for a beam supported at both ends. Moment and deflection formulas for point load, distributed load, and triangular distributed loads.
İnce uzun çubukların basınç altında burk: Buckling strength of slender rods under pressure. K changes according to support conditions.
Acisal temaslı bilyalı rulmanlar (Angula: Acisal temaslı bilyalı rulmanlar (Angular Contact Ball Bearings). Temas acisi 40 derece. Yuksek aksiyel ve radyal kombine yuklere uygun. Genellikle çiftli (tandem, O veya X duzeni) monte edilir. Takim tezgâhları ve pompalar icin idealdir.
